buckets.payg: Personal/PAYG individual expense (e.g. work-related deduction D-labels).
buckets.company: Pty Ltd business expense — the company books of record.
buckets.property_rented: Expense on a currently-rented investment property (generally deductible).
buckets.property_vacant: Holding cost on a vacant/not-genuinely-available property (often NOT deductible).

guidance: Categorise the receipt into exactly one bucket. Prefer 'unknown' (low confidence) over guessing. This is general information, not tax advice.
